_comment: Add the 'mlb-fantasy' block to your existing claude_desktop_config.json.
_comment_wsl: If Claude Desktop runs on Windows but this server is in WSL, use option B or C below.

mlb-fantasy._option_A_native_comment: Use this if server and Claude Desktop are on the same OS (Linux/Mac)

mlb-fantasy-wsl._option_B_wsl_comment: Use this for Windows Claude Desktop + WSL server via wsl.exe

_option_C_http: Run 'MCP_TRANSPORT=http python server/main.py' in WSL, then add to Claude Desktop as an SSE/HTTP MCP server at http://localhost:8000
